---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Clearbook
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A brief, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? Why would this be useful?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work from a user's perspective.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or any other relevant information.
